stem: A HR analytics study surveys 1000 staff members and observes 342 positive outcomes out of 1000 (34.2%). Estimate the true employee turnover rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.342. Wilson 95% CI: [0.3133, 0.372]. Point estimate: 0.3426.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
